title: SaveError-to-NoteSaveFailureReason mapping not exhaustively tested per REQ-EPNS-004
description: REQ-EPNS-004 defines an explicit mapping table with 6 entries: fs/permission->permission, fs/disk-full->disk-full, fs/lock->lock, fs/not-found->unknown, fs/unknown->unknown, validation/*->unknown. The tests only exercise the 'permission' case (step2 test line 155, pipeline test line 315). The remaining 5 mapping cases (disk-full, lock, not-found, unknown, validation) have no dedicated test cases. The mapSaveErrorToFailureReason function at flush-current-session.ts:95-105 does implement the mapping, but without test coverage the implementation correctness for each case is unverified. In particular, the `not-found` case is mapped to `unknown` via the `default` branch, which means it would break silently if a new FsError variant were added that should map differently.
recommendation: Add parameterized or individual test cases for each SaveError variant in the mapping table. Each test should verify the emitted NoteSaveFailed.reason matches the spec mapping.
